message:
feat(lab): integrate dual-run provenance into scenario runner, spork harness, and test logging

Wire DualRunScenarioIdentity, ReplayMetadata, and SeedLineageRecord
throughout the lab execution and test reporting pipeline so that every
test execution carries full provenance for replay, audit, and
mismatch artifact generation:

- scenario_runner.rs: ScenarioRunResult now carries adapter identity,
  replay_metadata, and seed_lineage; JSON summary includes surface_id
  and surface_contract_version for downstream tooling
- spork_harness.rs: SporkScenarioSpec gains surface_id,
  surface_contract_version, and seed_lineage_id fields for dual-run
  identity propagation through the harness lifecycle
- test_logging.rs: Major extension (+243 lines) —
  · TestContext gains adapter, replay_metadata, seed_lineage fields
  · New constructors: from_live_dual_run(), with_replay_provenance()
  · Surface accessors: surface_id(), surface_contract_version(),
    seed_lineage_id(), execution_instance_id()
  · ReproManifest carries full dual-run provenance; with_entropy_seed,
    with_config_hash, with_replay_command propagate into replay_metadata
  · Validation enforces consistency between manifest and metadata fields
  · replay_context_from_manifest() round-trips dual-run provenance
  · Default replay command updated to use rch exec wrapper
  · LIVE_CURRENT_THREAD_ADAPTER constant for Phase 1 runner identity
  · New tests: from_live_dual_run preserves identity, manifest
    round-trips dual-run metadata
- e2e_harness.rs: from_dual_run_identity() constructor; repro command
  updated to use rch exec wrapper
- common/mod.rs: Re-export dual-run types (DualRunScenarioIdentity,
  ExecutionInstanceId, Phase, ReplayMetadata, etc.); new helpers
  test_lab_from_dual_run_identity() and
  test_context_from_dual_run_identity()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
